description_long: This perfume set features two cylindrical bottles, each with a marble-like finish—one in black with white veining and the other in white with subtle gray marbling. Both bottles are topped with glossy black pump dispensers, which are slightly flared at the top and have a modern, minimalist design. The pumps are equipped with horizontal spouts for dispensing the fragrance, and the overall look is sleek and contemporary. The marble textures give the bottles a luxurious and elegant appearance, suitable for upscale urban environments. No visible branding or text is present on the bottles, emphasizing their clean and sophisticated aesthetic. The bottles appear to be made primarily of polished stone or ceramic with plastic or metal pump mechanisms.
description: A pair of cylindrical marble-patterned perfume bottles, one black and one white, each with a glossy black pump dispenser and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles side by side, highlighting the contrasting black and white marble finishes and the glossy black pump tops.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the white bottle in the foreground, with the black bottle partially visible behind; the pump spouts are clearly seen extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view of both bottles, with the white bottle on the left and the black bottle on the right, emphasizing the smooth marble textures and cylindrical shapes.
description_view_3: Side view with the black bottle in the foreground, showing the pump spouts and the marble veining on the black surface.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle cap is integrated into the pump dispenser, which is glossy black, slightly flared at the top, and cylindrical. It appears to be made of plastic or coated metal, with a smooth, reflective finish and no visible decorative elements. The cap is likely removable for refilling or cleaning.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is a simple, upright cylinder with a flat base and a slightly narrower, flared cylindrical pump top, creating a clean and symmetrical outline.
attribute_decorative_elements: Distinct marble-patterned finishes on both bottles—one black with white veining, the other white with subtle gray marbling—serve as the primary decorative elements.
